piece.title: Still Cove
piece.notes: v2 — same three-movement shape but each movement now has internal sectional variation rather than a single long bar count. Opening builds from breath to arrival; center has a hinge and peak; release dissolves through two stages.

sections.name: opening_breath
sections.notes: Arrival from silence. Nothing stated yet — harmony barely breathes, melody almost absent. Let the reverb tails from Logic do the work.

sections.name: awaken
sections.notes: Arrival from silence. Nothing stated yet — harmony barely breathes, melody almost absent. Let the reverb tails from Logic do the work.

sections.name: opening_motion
sections.notes: First movement enters. Melody starts developing, bass still anchored, counterpoint begins underneath.

sections.name: opening_arrival
sections.notes: The opening lands. Full texture, melody lyrical, bass moves to root_fifth. This is where the cinematic feeling crystallizes.

sections.name: opening_motion
sections.notes: First movement enters. Melody starts developing, bass still anchored, counterpoint begins underneath.

sections.name: opening_arrival
sections.notes: The opening lands. Full texture, melody lyrical, bass moves to root_fifth. This is where the cinematic feeling crystallizes.

sections.name: center_hinge
sections.notes: Harmonic shift — III and VII brought forward, creating a brighter dorian color. A moment of openness before the long swell.

sections.name: center_swell
sections.notes: The long ascent. Density increases, arc builds steadily. The emotional center of the piece.

sections.name: center_peak
sections.notes: Sustain the peak before the turn. Plateau here — no crescendo, just fullness. The breath before the release.

sections.name: release_turn
sections.notes: The turn. iv-i darkens the color and begins the dissolution. Bass pulls back to root_only. Counterpoint drops out.

sections.name: release_dissolve
sections.notes: Final dissolution. Only iv and i remain — minimal harmonic motion, long chord durations, melody sparse. Let it evaporate.
